english: With matted locks made beautiful by the waves of the Ganga
Whose left side is ever adorned by Gauri
Dear to Narayana, destroyer of the pride of Manmatha (Cupid)
I worship Vishwanatha, the lord of Varanasi city
Devoted to truth, ever beautiful, with the moon on his crest
roman: Satya priyam satata sundara chandra moulin

english: Fond of serpents, with body adorned by groups of gems
roman: Sarpa priyam mani ganaira bhibhushit angam

hindi: शिवप्रियं शिव शिव शिव शिव शिव,
english: Shiva who is dear to Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Shiva
roman: Shiva priyam Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva

english: I worship Vishwanatha, the lord of Varanasi city
Whoever reads this Vishvanath Ashtakam with devotion
roman: Vishvanatha ashtakam idam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

hindi: काशीं प्राप्नोति मोक्षं च विश्वनाथस्य दर्शनात्॥
english: Attains Kashi and liberation through the darshan of Vishwanatha
roman: Kashim prapnoti moksham cha Vishvanathasya darshanat
